properties.entry: SELECT COUNT(Individual) FROM Individual WHERE :segmentId = ANY(Individual.segmentIds) ORDER BY Individual.id
SELECT COUNT(Individual) FROM Individual JOIN Field ON Individual.id = Field.ownerid WHERE :segmentId = ANY(Individual.segmentIds) AND Field.name = "email" AND Field.value IS NOT NULL
SELECT Individual.id FROM Individual WHERE :segmentId = ANY(Individual.segmentIds) ORDER BY Individual.id
